title: Prospective Q2.6 seed-2 diagnostic
body: Run only seed 2 from merged Zero commit 412ab70a7922a8f964a3ab7429dd601ba0250383. The only intervention is the global all-six-slice tangent projection. Preserve Q2.5's initialization, corpora, teachers, optimizer, geometric scales, quantity gates, 1.5% commit authority, 2% public replay ceiling, 25-commit recovery cadence, 100-commit public cadence, 1000 acquisition and 400 consolidation attempt caps, eight-exhaustion fallback, sealed promotion rule, and seed-1/3 replication lock. Resolve go only after public and promotion gates; otherwise resolve no_go as valid evidence.
claims: No Q2.6 seed-2 outcome is observed before the source contract, ilXyr experiment, forecasts, and funding commitments merge.
A valid no-go is terminal evidence and does not authorize threshold tuning, a duplicate seed-2 run, or access to sealed seeds.
